subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that the Luminary of the Most Great Name hath dawned and shone forth from the horizon of eternity, and the Ocean of generosity hath become manifest and surging, O friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله نیر اسم اعظم از افق قدم طالع و مشرق و بحر کرم ظاهر و مواج ای دوستان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
